items.search: Choose a convenient time and route

passenger.title: Passenger transport across Ukraine
passenger.desc: Comfortable and safe trips between Ukrainian cities. Modern buses and experienced drivers.

groupTransfer.title: Group transfer
groupTransfer.desc: Organized transfers for groups of any size, ideal for trips and meetings.

excursions.title: Bus rental for excursions
excursions.desc: Comfortable and safe travel for excursions and city tours with modern buses.

seaTours.title: Sea tours
seaTours.desc: Routes to popular seaside resorts. Your отдых starts on the road.

schoolBus.title: School bus
schoolBus.desc: Safe and organized transportation for students to excursions and events.

corporate.title: Corporate travel
corporate.desc: Transport service for corporate events, conferences, and team trips.

wedding.title: Wedding bus rental
wedding.desc: Elegant transport for wedding guests. Comfort and punctuality on your special day.

pilgrimage.title: Pilgrimage and religious tours
pilgrimage.desc: Trips to sacred and religious places with respect for your needs.

mourning.title: Mourning transport rental
mourning.desc: Delicate and reliable transportation support for farewell ceremonies.

text.one: "Autolux-Cherkasy-Plus" LLC has been successfully operating in the passenger bus transportation market for many years. We are a key hub that connects thousands of people, cities, and routes every day.
text.two: From a small start to a strong fleet — our experience works for your comfort. We ensure technical reliability of every vehicle and high service quality.
text.three: Our mission is to provide residents and guests with affordable, reliable, and stable bus connections. We want every passenger to feel respected and safe.
text.four: Our drivers stand out for strong technical knowledge, excellent understanding of Ukraine’s roads, and proven accident-free experience.
